rationale: ADR-compliance lens, clean. ADR-0037 (single decision home): `mindspec complete` appears NOWHERE in ms-panel.js (grep confirms); no re-implementation of PanelGateDecision/threshold/consolidation — the two 'approve_threshold'/'consolidat' hits are comments explaining deference to the binary; ALLOWED_CLI is exactly the four permitted verbs with buildCommand the sole assembler; panel.json is written only via `panel create`; §8 trust boundary untouched (no signing/hashing). ADR-0040 (portability): 111 is the first non-default runner adapter, integrating at the artifact+CLI contract (panel verbs + verdict/panel.json schema), never prompt-format; degraded modes are explicit — `external` -> skills/human path and 'host lacking workflow capability degrades to skills path' (SKILL.md L22/L24); runner default stays `claude-code-skills` (config.go:336,477); codex exec'd read-only by the agent's own shell (ADR-0030 boundary honored). ADR-0035 (recovery): verify+tally stdout returned VERBATIM so recovery lines reach the orchestrator unaltered; missing/quota slots surface via verify -> gate Blocks, never silently dropped. ADR-0036 (ownership): `.claude/workflows/**` claim present; changeset touches only workflow-owned paths + spec/plan docs. All four anchored touchpoints resolve to existing files. ADR-0040 correctly cited in PROSE only (not anchored), honoring 110's R6 file-resolution rule. Copies byte-identical.
findings: ADR-0037: `mindspec complete` absent from ms-panel.js (structural no-complete); ALLOWED_CLI = 4 verbs; workflow returns verify/tally verbatim and never re-derives the decision — single decision home preserved.

ADR-0040: first non-default runner adapter at the contract level; degraded modes named (external stub -> skills/human; no-workflow-capability host -> skills path); runner default unchanged (claude-code-skills). R6-style rule respected — ADR-0040 referenced in prose only within the anchored touchpoints, all four of which (0037/0035/0036/0034) resolve to existing files.

ADR-0035: verify+tally output passed through verbatim ('do not summarize, reformat, or paraphrase'), so guard recovery lines survive; false-flag quota path leaves the slot MISSING (gate Blocks), never a silent dropped slot.
ADR-0036: `.claude/workflows/**` OWNERSHIP claim present and validate test pins attributeDomain->workflow; no source edited outside workflow-owned globs.

Observation (non-blocking): the spec-approve panel artifacts land at repo-root `review/spec-111-approve/**` (legacy location) rather than the ADR-0039 co-located `.mindspec/specs/.../reviews/`. These are permanently-classified non-source review artifacts (per ADR-0037's 2026-06-24 amendment which KEEPS the root `review/**` non-source matcher), not 111 source, and do not affect the gate or ADR compliance.
